note: Known-license header signatures for license-fork-eligibility (spec 043 US3, FR-030). Each entry maps distinctive text found in a LICENSE file to a fork-eligibility category. Matching is case-insensitive substring search over the license text, in array order (most specific first: AGPL/LGPL before GPL, ShareAlike before plain CC-BY, and the proprietary 'all rights reserved' catch LAST so a permissive/BSD license carrying that phrase is classified by its grant, not the phrase). No match anywhere -> `unspecified` (never inferred from author/copyright). Deterministic in-repo table, no network (FR-004).
